actions.title: Define the trace, policy, approval, and learning-loop evidence pack for SIGNAL-E L3
actions.outcome: A reusable evidence contract that shows exactly what unlocks SIGNAL-E L3 across the fleet.
actions.rationale: The SIGNAL fleet runner shows 18 repos at SIGNAL-E L2 and blocks L3 until trace, policy, approval, and learning-loop evidence is published.

evidence.reason: SIGNAL bottlenecks and next unlocks
Execution Studio draft-mode and approval-boundary requirements

validationGate.successCriteria: SIGNAL witness remains green and L3 gaps are machine-readable.

approvalRequest.reason: Adding or changing canonical evidence contracts requires owner review.

releaseGate.name: signal-l3-contract-ready
criteria: schema exists
runner can cite trace/policy/approval evidence
Observatory surfaces L3 blockers

acceptanceCriteria: Defines trace, policy, approval, learning-loop, and rollback evidence fields.
Documents why graph/RAG/MCP readiness alone cannot claim L3.
Includes validation commands and failure modes.

actions.title: Draft the bridge-os fleet execution runner contract
actions.outcome: A bridge-owned runner contract for turning Kaleidoscope draft actions into approved work artifacts.
actions.rationale: Execution Studio needs a controlled runner boundary before it can create tickets, branches, or repo edits.

evidence.reason: strategic recommendations and execution focus
Execution Studio draft-mode and approval-boundary requirements

validationGate.successCriteria: Every draft action has owner repo, evidence, validation, approval, and release gate.

approvalRequest.reason: Any future runner that writes to repos or work systems crosses a state-changing boundary.

releaseGate.name: draft-runner-only
criteria: default mode remains draft-only
write actions require approval
owner routing is explicit

acceptanceCriteria: Runner contract separates draft, write, external, and deploy boundaries.
Approval request format is embedded in every action.
No action can ship without a validation gate.

actions.title: Resolve missing MPR relation for bridge-os and terminal-os
actions.outcome: Bridge and terminal no longer appear as under-evidenced in SIGNAL/MPR rollups.
actions.rationale: The SIGNAL fleet witness shows missing MPR relation for bridge-os and terminal-os, holding their SIGNAL-E process evidence at L1.

evidence.reason: SIGNAL bottlenecks and next unlocks
current fleet readiness, MPR, SIGNAL, and blockers

validationGate.successCriteria: MPR relation count increases or an explicit no-MPR relation witness is published.

approvalRequest.reason: Publishing repo evidence or no-MPR relation witnesses affects fleet scoring.

releaseGate.name: mpr-relation-complete
criteria: bridge-os relation resolved
terminal-os relation resolved
Observatory MPR column explains n/a states

acceptanceCriteria: Lists the exact repos with missing MPR relation.
Routes owner review before publishing replacement evidence.
Keeps SIGNAL score conservative until evidence exists.

actions.title: Define the 8.5 uplift task format
actions.outcome: A repeatable task format that converts repo gaps into 8.5 readiness work.
actions.rationale: The user goal is 8.5 readiness; Kaleidoscope needs a standard task format before dispatching repo-level uplift work.

evidence.reason: current fleet readiness, MPR, SIGNAL, and blockers
Execution Studio draft-mode and approval-boundary requirements

validationGate.successCriteria: Generated actions include target readiness, validation, approval, and release gates.

approvalRequest.reason: Changing task format affects execution across agile-os and downstream repos.

releaseGate.name: 85-task-format-ready
criteria: task format includes evidence refs
owner repo is mandatory
validation command is mandatory
approval status is mandatory

acceptanceCriteria: Supports repo, fleet, and product-surface actions.
Maps every task to an 8.5 readiness outcome.
Can be consumed by agile-os without losing evidence trace.

actions.title: Add prior/current movement history to Observatory
actions.outcome: Observatory can answer movement since last audit from prior/current snapshots.
actions.rationale: The current Observatory explicitly reports movement unavailable because no prior Kaleidoscope graph snapshot is present.

evidence.reason: current fleet readiness, MPR, SIGNAL, and blockers
strategic recommendations and execution focus

validationGate.successCriteria: movementAvailable becomes true when a prior snapshot fixture is present.

approvalRequest.reason: Adding historical snapshots changes movement analysis and should be reviewed.

releaseGate.name: movement-history-ready
criteria: prior snapshot path documented
delta fields populated
Decision Room can cite movement

acceptanceCriteria: Does not overwrite latest evidence.
Supports replay from archived snapshots.
Reports score deltas per repo.

actions.title: Draft partner-ready market leadership execution room
actions.outcome: A cited partner/investor briefing packet for the African commodity-trade operating-system wedge.
actions.rationale: Decision Room identifies the governed African commodity-trade operating system as the strongest market leadership opportunity.

evidence.reason: strategic recommendations and execution focus
current fleet readiness, MPR, SIGNAL, and blockers

validationGate.successCriteria: Strategic market answer keeps citation, freshness, confidence, and unsupported-claim gates green.

approvalRequest.reason: Partner-facing narratives require approval before external use.

releaseGate.name: partner-room-draft-ready
criteria: claims cite current evidence
unsupported-claim warnings remain zero
external use remains blocked until approval

acceptanceCriteria: Separates internal evidence from external claims.
Routes market, compliance, and verification repos explicitly.
Keeps unsupported claims at zero.

actions.title: Close commercial evidence gaps for inspection-os
actions.outcome: inspection-os has current traction, partner, revenue, deployment, and workflow evidence available to the Observatory.
actions.rationale: Observatory commercial evidence shows 1/5 categories evidenced for inspection-os; gaps: partner, revenue, deployment, workflow.

evidence.reason: current fleet readiness, MPR, SIGNAL, and blockers
Execution Studio draft-mode and approval-boundary requirements

validationGate.successCriteria: inspection-os commercial evidence gaps are reduced or explicitly documented as not applicable.

approvalRequest.reason: Adding partner, revenue, deployment, traction, or workflow evidence can affect venture and partner-readiness scoring.

releaseGate.name: inspection-os-commercial-evidence-ready
criteria: owner repo publishes or confirms evidence for each missing category
Observatory commercial evidence rerun reflects the change
partner/investor claims remain blocked until explicitly approved

acceptanceCriteria: Addresses gaps: partner, revenue, deployment, workflow.
Uses repo-owned evidence paths rather than ecosystem-level assumptions.
Does not convert internal evidence into external claims without approval.
